data.name: Desc_DefaultValueNormalizer_Description
data.value: **Default Value Normalizer** - Sets a default value when the field is empty or null. This normalizer ensures that fields always have a meaningful value by replacing empty or null entries with a predefined default value.

data.name: Desc_DefaultValueNormalizer_DefaultValue_Description
data.value: **Default Value** - The value that will be assigned when the field is empty or null. This should be a meaningful default value that represents the most common or safe value for this field.

data.name: Desc_TrimSpacesNormalizer_Description
data.value: **Trim Spaces Normalizer** - Removes whitespace from the beginning and end of text. This normalizer cleans user input by removing unnecessary spaces that could cause data inconsistencies or validation issues.

data.name: Desc_NullIfEmptyNormalizer_Description
data.value: **Null If Empty Normalizer** - Converts empty strings to null values. This normalizer standardizes empty data representation by ensuring that empty strings are consistently represented as null values in the system.

data.name: Desc_ToUpperNormalizer_Description
data.value: **To Upper Normalizer** - Converts text to uppercase letters. This normalizer standardizes text case for consistency in data storage and comparison operations, ensuring all text follows the same uppercase convention.

data.name: Desc_CollapseSpacesNormalizer_Description
data.value: **Collapse Spaces Normalizer** - Replaces multiple internal spaces with a single space and trims leading/trailing spaces. Useful to clean inputs with inconsistent spacing and improve comparability and uniform storage.

data.name: Desc_ToTitleCaseNormalizer_Description
data.value: **To Title Case Normalizer** - Converts text to Title Case respecting the rules of a specified culture. Ideal for proper names, addresses, and fields requiring standardized capitalization.

data.name: Desc_ToTitleCaseNormalizer_Culture_Description
data.value: **Culture** - Culture code (e.g., es-ES, en-US) used to compute Title Case. Defaults to "es-ES".

data.name: Desc_E164PhoneNormalizer_Description
data.value: **Phone E.164 Normalizer** - Converts phone numbers to the international E.164 format using libphonenumber. Validates number and region before formatting; leaves unchanged if the number is not valid.

data.name: Desc_E164PhoneNormalizer_RegionIso_Description
data.value: **Region ISO** - ISO country code (e.g., ES, US, MX) used to parse and validate the phone number. Defaults to "ES".

data.name: Desc_RemoveDiacriticsNormalizer_Description
data.value: **Remove Diacritics Normalizer** - Removes accents and diacritic marks from strings to facilitate normalization and comparisons. Can optionally preserve ñ/Ñ.

data.name: Desc_RemoveDiacriticsNormalizer_PreserveEnie_Description
data.value: **Preserve ñ/Ñ** - When enabled, keeps ñ/Ñ characters without removing their tilde. Enabled by default.

data.name: Desc_HashCharNormalizer_Description
data.value: **Hash Character Normalizer** - Replaces special characters with hash symbol (#). This normalizer sanitizes text by replacing potentially problematic special characters with a safe placeholder character.

data.name: Desc_AdvancedCleanNormalizer_Description
data.value: **Advanced Clean Normalizer** - Performs comprehensive string cleaning by applying multiple transformation rules: handles '#' characters (removal at edges, conversion to 'ñ' between letters), eliminates excessive dot sequences, converts short dot/comma-only strings to NULL, removes leading dots/spaces, transforms repetitive strings (>3 chars) to NULL, replaces special characters (,:¿*\| → dot, -_ → space), removes '¡y]' pattern, and consolidates multiple spaces. Ensures data consistency and quality through automatic sanitization.

data.name: Desc_JsScriptNormalizer_Description
data.value: **JavaScript Script Normalizer** - Normalizes values using a custom JavaScript script. This normalizer provides maximum flexibility by allowing custom normalization logic to be implemented through JavaScript code.

data.name: Desc_JsScriptNormalizer_NotifyChanges
data.value: **Notify Changes** - Indicates whether changes made by the normalizer should be notified to other components. When enabled, the system will broadcast notifications about value modifications made by this normalizer.

data.name: Desc_RequiredFieldValidator_Description
data.value: **Required Field Validator** - Validates that the field has a value and is not empty. This validator ensures that mandatory fields contain meaningful data before processing or storage.

data.name: Desc_ListValidator_Description
data.value: **List Validator** - Validates that the value is within a list of allowed values or not in a list of forbidden values. This validator provides flexible list-based validation to control acceptable input values.

data.name: Desc_ListValidator_AllowedValues_Description
data.value: **Allowed Values** - Comma-separated list of allowed values. Only values present in this list will be considered valid. Leave empty to disable allowed values checking.

data.name: Desc_ListValidator_ForbiddenValues_Description
data.value: **Forbidden Values** - Comma-separated list of forbidden values. Values present in this list will be rejected as invalid. Leave empty to disable forbidden values checking.

data.name: Desc_TextLengthValidator_Description
data.value: **Text Length Validator** - Validates that the text length is within the specified range. This validator ensures that text inputs meet minimum and maximum length requirements for proper data handling.

data.name: Desc_TextLengthValidator_MinLength_Description
data.value: **Minimum Length** - The minimum allowed length for the text. Text shorter than this value will be considered invalid. Set to 0 to disable minimum length checking.

data.name: Desc_TextLengthValidator_MaxLength_Description
data.value: **Maximum Length** - The maximum allowed length for the text. Text longer than this value will be considered invalid. Set to a large number to effectively disable maximum length checking.

data.name: Desc_CountValidator_Description
data.value: **Count Validator** - Validates that the number of items is within the specified range. This validator ensures that collections or arrays contain an appropriate number of elements.

data.name: Desc_CountValidator_MinCount_Description
data.value: **Minimum Count** - The minimum number of items allowed. Collections with fewer items will be considered invalid.

data.name: Desc_CountValidator_MaxCount_Description
data.value: **Maximum Count** - The maximum number of items allowed. Collections with more items will be considered invalid.

data.name: Desc_RangeDateValidator_Description
data.value: **Date Range Validator** - Validates that a date falls within the specified range. This validator ensures that date values are between acceptable minimum and maximum dates. Supports fixed dates (DateTime) and dynamic expressions like `Today-40y`, `StartOfYear+3M`, `Now+7d`. Expressions allow creating relative ranges to the current moment using formats like: `[Base]±N[Unit]` where Base can be `Today`, `Now`, `StartOfYear/Month/Week`, `EndOfYear/Month/Week` and units can be `y`(years), `M`(months), `w`(weeks), `d`(days), `h`(hours), `m`(minutes), `s`(seconds).

data.name: Desc_RangeDateValidator_MinValue_Description
data.value: **Minimum Date** - The earliest date allowed. Dates before this value will be considered invalid. Accepts fixed DateTime values or dynamic expressions. Expression examples: `Today-18y` (18 years ago), `StartOfYear` (start of current year), `Now-7d` (7 days ago), `Today-3M` (3 months ago). Expressions enable contextual validations that automatically adjust to the execution moment.

data.name: Desc_RangeDateValidator_MaxValue_Description
data.value: **Maximum Date** - The latest date allowed. Dates after this value will be considered invalid. Accepts fixed DateTime values or dynamic expressions. Expression examples: `Today+5y` (5 years from today), `EndOfYear` (end of current year), `Now+30d` (30 days from now), `StartOfMonth+1M` (start of next month). Expressions are evaluated in real-time enabling adaptive ranges.

data.name: Desc_RangeDecimalValidator_Description
data.value: **Range Decimal Validator** - Validates that the decimal number is within the specified range. This validator ensures that decimal values fall between acceptable minimum and maximum limits.

data.name: Desc_RangeDecimalValidator_MinValue_Description
data.value: **Minimum Decimal Value** - The smallest allowed decimal value. Numbers below this value will be considered invalid.

data.name: Desc_RangeDecimalValidator_MaxValue_Description
data.value: **Maximum Decimal Value** - The largest allowed decimal value. Numbers above this value will be considered invalid.

data.name: Desc_RangeNumberValidator_Description
data.value: **Range Number Validator** - Validates that the number is within the specified range. This validator ensures that numeric values fall between acceptable minimum and maximum limits.

data.name: Desc_RangeNumberValidator_MinValue_Description
data.value: **Minimum Numeric Value** - The smallest allowed numeric value. Numbers below this value will be considered invalid.

data.name: Desc_RangeNumberValidator_MaxValue_Description
data.value: **Maximum Numeric Value** - The largest allowed numeric value. Numbers above this value will be considered invalid.

data.name: Desc_InvalidDateValidator_Description
data.value: **Invalid Date Validator** - Validates that the date is not invalid or malformed. This validator ensures that date values are properly formatted and represent valid dates.

data.name: Desc_NullOrMinus99IntValidator_Description
data.value: **Null or Minus 99 Integer Validator** - Validates that the value is either null or exactly -99. This validator is used for specific business rules where only null or -99 values are acceptable.

data.name: Desc_NullOrEmptyStringValidator_Description
data.value: **Null or Empty String Validator** - Validates that the string value is either null or empty. This validator ensures that only null or empty string values are accepted.

data.name: Desc_RegexValidator_Description
data.value: **Regular Expression Validator** - Validates that the value matches a specified regular expression pattern. This validator provides flexible pattern-based validation for complex text format requirements.

data.name: Desc_RegexValidator_Pattern
data.value: **Regular Expression Pattern** - The regular expression pattern that the value must match. Use standard regex syntax to define the validation pattern.

data.name: Desc_JsScriptValidator_Description
data.value: **JavaScript Script Validator** - Validates values using a custom JavaScript script. This validator provides maximum flexibility by allowing custom validation logic to be implemented through JavaScript code.

data.name: Desc_JsScriptRule_Description
data.value: **JavaScript Script Rule** - Executes custom business logic using JavaScript. This rule provides maximum flexibility by allowing custom rule implementation through JavaScript code.

data.name: Desc_JsScriptRule_Expression
data.value: **JavaScript Expression** - The JavaScript code that will be executed to evaluate the rule. The expression should return a boolean value indicating rule success or failure.

data.name: Desc_JsScriptRule_Name
data.value: **Rule Name** - A descriptive name for this JavaScript rule. This name will be used for identification and logging purposes.

data.name: Desc_JsScriptRule_ErrorMessage
data.value: **Error Message** - The message that will be displayed when the rule fails. This should provide clear information about what went wrong.

data.name: Desc_JsScriptRule_ErrorSeverityLevel
data.value: **Error Severity Level** - The severity level of the error when the rule fails. This determines how the error will be handled by the system.

data.name: Desc_JsScriptRule_RuleName_Description
data.value: **Rule Name** - A unique identifier for this JavaScript rule. This name is used for rule management and execution tracking.

data.name: Desc_JsScriptRule_Expression_Description
data.value: **JavaScript Expression** - The JavaScript code that implements the rule logic. The expression has access to the current data context and should return a validation result.

data.name: Desc_PluginRule_Description
data.value: **Plugin Rule** - Executes custom business logic through an external plugin. This rule allows integration with external libraries and custom implementations.

data.name: Desc_PluginRule_PluginName_Description
data.value: **Plugin Name** - The name of the plugin that contains the rule implementation. This must match a registered plugin in the system.

data.name: Desc_PluginRule_MethodName_Description
data.value: **Method Name** - The specific method within the plugin that will be executed. This method must exist in the specified plugin.

data.name: Desc_DatabaseValidator_Description
data.value: **Database Validator** - Validates values by executing a custom SQL query against the database. This validator provides flexible validation based on data stored in the database.

data.name: Desc_DatabaseNormalizer_Description
data.value: **Database Normalizer** - Normalizes values by executing a custom SQL query against the database. This normalizer allows data transformation based on information stored in the database.

data.name: Desc_HpptNormalizer_Description
data.value: **HTTP Normalizer** - Normalizes values by making a call to an external HTTP service.

data.name: Desc_JSTransformation_Description
data.value: **JS Transformation** - Transforms an input object to an output object using a JavaScript script.

data.name: Desc_JSTransformation_OutputType_Description
data.value: **Output Type** - JSON Schema defining the structure of the transformation result object.

data.name: Desc_DatabaseValidator_SQLSmtp_Description
data.value: **SQL Query** - SQL query to validate the value. Supports parameters @Value, {oldValue.Property}, {newValue.Property}.

data.name: Desc_DatabaseNormalizer_SQLSmtp_Description
data.value: **SQL Query** - SQL query to normalize the value. Supports parameters @Value, {oldValue.Property}, {newValue.Property}.

data.name: Desc_Database_DataBaseName_Description
data.value: **Database Name** - Name or alias of the configured database where the SQL query will be executed.

data.name: Log_AdvancedCleanNormalizer_Starting
data.value: **Starting AdvancedCleanNormalizer execution** - The normalizer is beginning advanced text cleaning operations

data.name: Log_AdvancedCleanNormalizer_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with AdvancedCleanNormalizer** - Applying advanced cleaning rules to normalize the text value

data.name: Log_AdvancedCleanNormalizer_Success
data.value: **AdvancedCleanNormalizer execution completed successfully** - Advanced text cleaning finished without errors

data.name: Log_TrimSpacesNormalizer_Starting
data.value: **Starting TrimSpacesNormalizer execution** - The normalizer is beginning whitespace trimming operations

data.name: Log_TrimSpacesNormalizer_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with TrimSpacesNormalizer** - Removing leading and trailing whitespace from the value

data.name: Log_TrimSpacesNormalizer_Success
data.value: **TrimSpacesNormalizer execution completed successfully** - Whitespace trimming finished without errors

data.name: Log_TrimSpacesNormalizer_Error
data.value: **Error in TrimSpacesNormalizer execution** - A problem occurred during whitespace trimming

data.name: Log_NullIfEmptyNormalizer_Starting
data.value: **Starting NullIfEmptyNormalizer execution** - The normalizer is beginning empty string to null conversion

data.name: Log_NullIfEmptyNormalizer_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with NullIfEmptyNormalizer** - Converting empty strings to null values

data.name: Log_NullIfEmptyNormalizer_Success
data.value: **NullIfEmptyNormalizer execution completed successfully** - Empty string to null conversion finished without errors

data.name: Log_NullIfEmptyNormalizer_Error
data.value: **Error in NullIfEmptyNormalizer execution** - A problem occurred during empty string to null conversion

data.name: Log_ToUpperNormalizer_Starting
data.value: **Starting ToUpperNormalizer execution** - The normalizer is beginning uppercase conversion operations

data.name: Log_ToUpperNormalizer_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with ToUpperNormalizer** - Converting text to uppercase letters

data.name: Log_ToUpperNormalizer_Success
data.value: **ToUpperNormalizer execution completed successfully** - Uppercase conversion finished without errors

data.name: Log_ToUpperNormalizer_Error
data.value: **Error in ToUpperNormalizer execution** - A problem occurred during uppercase conversion

data.name: Log_HashCharNormalizer_Starting
data.value: **Starting HashCharNormalizer execution** - The normalizer is beginning special character replacement operations

data.name: Log_HashCharNormalizer_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with HashCharNormalizer** - Replacing special characters with hash symbols

data.name: Log_HashCharNormalizer_Success
data.value: **HashCharNormalizer execution completed successfully** - Special character replacement finished without errors

data.name: Log_HashCharNormalizer_Error
data.value: **Error in HashCharNormalizer execution** - A problem occurred during special character replacement

data.name: Log_DefaultValueNormalizer_Starting
data.value: **Starting DefaultValueNormalizer execution** - The normalizer is beginning default value assignment operations

data.name: Log_DefaultValueNormalizer_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with DefaultValueNormalizer** - Assigning default value to empty or null fields

data.name: Log_DefaultValueNormalizer_Success
data.value: **DefaultValueNormalizer execution completed successfully** - Default value assignment finished without errors

data.name: Log_DefaultValueNormalizer_Error
data.value: **Error in DefaultValueNormalizer execution** - A problem occurred during default value assignment

data.name: Log_CountValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting CountValidator execution** - The validator is beginning item count verification

data.name: Log_CountValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with CountValidator** - Validating that the item count is within the allowed range

data.name: Log_CountValidator_Success
data.value: **CountValidator execution completed successfully** - Item count validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_CountValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in CountValidator execution** - A problem occurred during item count validation

data.name: Log_NullOrEmptyStringValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting NullOrEmptyStringValidator execution** - The validator is beginning null or empty string verification

data.name: Log_NullOrEmptyStringValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with NullOrEmptyStringValidator** - Validating that the value is null or empty string

data.name: Log_NullOrEmptyStringValidator_Success
data.value: **NullOrEmptyStringValidator execution completed successfully** - Null or empty string validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_NullOrEmptyStringValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in NullOrEmptyStringValidator execution** - A problem occurred during null or empty string validation

data.name: Log_RequiredFieldValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting RequiredFieldValidator execution** - The validator is beginning required field verification

data.name: Log_RequiredFieldValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with RequiredFieldValidator** - Validating that the required field has a value

data.name: Log_RequiredFieldValidator_Success
data.value: **RequiredFieldValidator execution completed successfully** - Required field validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_RequiredFieldValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in RequiredFieldValidator execution** - A problem occurred during required field validation

data.name: Log_RangeDecimalValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting RangeDecimalValidator execution** - The validator is beginning decimal range verification

data.name: Log_RangeDecimalValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with RangeDecimalValidator** - Validating that the decimal value is within the allowed range

data.name: Log_RangeDecimalValidator_Success
data.value: **RangeDecimalValidator execution completed successfully** - Decimal range validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_RangeDecimalValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in RangeDecimalValidator execution** - A problem occurred during decimal range validation

data.name: Log_RangeDateValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting RangeDateValidator execution** - The validator is beginning date range verification

data.name: Log_RangeDateValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with RangeDateValidator** - Validating that the date is within the allowed range

data.name: Log_RangeDateValidator_Success
data.value: **RangeDateValidator execution completed successfully** - Date range validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_RangeDateValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in RangeDateValidator execution** - A problem occurred during date range validation

data.name: Log_InvalidDateValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting InvalidDateValidator execution** - The validator is beginning invalid date verification

data.name: Log_InvalidDateValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with InvalidDateValidator** - Validating that the date is not invalid or malformed

data.name: Log_InvalidDateValidator_Success
data.value: **InvalidDateValidator execution completed successfully** - Invalid date validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_InvalidDateValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in InvalidDateValidator execution** - A problem occurred during invalid date validation

data.name: Log_NullOrMinus99IntValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting NullOrMinus99IntValidator execution** - The validator is beginning null or -99 value verification

data.name: Log_NullOrMinus99IntValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with NullOrMinus99IntValidator** - Validating that the value is null or exactly -99

data.name: Log_NullOrMinus99IntValidator_Success
data.value: **NullOrMinus99IntValidator execution completed successfully** - Null or -99 validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_NullOrMinus99IntValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in NullOrMinus99IntValidator execution** - A problem occurred during null or -99 validation

data.name: Log_RegexValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting RegexValidator execution** - The validator is beginning regular expression verification

data.name: Log_RegexValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with RegexValidator** - Validating that the value matches the regular expression pattern

data.name: Log_RegexValidator_Success
data.value: **RegexValidator execution completed successfully** - Regular expression validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_RegexValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in RegexValidator execution** - A problem occurred during regular expression validation

data.name: Log_RangeNumberValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting RangeNumberValidator execution** - The validator is beginning numeric range verification

data.name: Log_RangeNumberValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with RangeNumberValidator** - Validating that the number is within the allowed range

data.name: Log_RangeNumberValidator_Success
data.value: **RangeNumberValidator execution completed successfully** - Numeric range validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_RangeNumberValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in RangeNumberValidator execution** - A problem occurred during numeric range validation

data.name: Log_ListValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting ListValidator execution** - The validator is beginning list value verification

data.name: Log_ListValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with ListValidator** - Validating that the value is in the allowed list or not in the forbidden list

data.name: Log_ListValidator_NotInAllowed
data.value: **ListValidator validation failed: value not in allowed list** - The provided value is not found in the allowed values

data.name: Log_ListValidator_InForbidden
data.value: **ListValidator validation failed: value is in forbidden list** - The provided value is found in the forbidden values

data.name: Log_ListValidator_ValidValue
data.value: **ListValidator validation successful: value is valid** - The provided value meets the list restrictions

data.name: Log_ListValidator_NullValue
data.value: **ListValidator validation successful: value is null** - Null value is accepted according to validator configuration

data.name: Log_ListValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in ListValidator execution** - A problem occurred during list validation

data.name: Log_DatabaseValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting DatabaseValidator execution** - The validator is beginning SQL validation query execution

data.name: Log_DatabaseValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with DatabaseValidator** - Executing SQL query to validate the field value

data.name: Log_DatabaseValidator_Success
data.value: **DatabaseValidator execution completed successfully** - Database validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_DatabaseValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in DatabaseValidator execution** - A problem occurred during database validation

data.name: Log_DatabaseNormalizer_Starting
data.value: **Starting DatabaseNormalizer execution** - The normalizer is beginning SQL normalization query execution

data.name: Log_DatabaseNormalizer_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with DatabaseNormalizer** - Executing SQL query to normalize the field value

data.name: Log_DatabaseNormalizer_Success
data.value: **DatabaseNormalizer execution completed successfully** - Database normalization finished without errors

data.name: Log_DatabaseNormalizer_Error
data.value: **Error in DatabaseNormalizer execution** - A problem occurred during database normalization

data.name: Log_DatabaseTranslator_Starting
data.value: **Starting DatabaseTranslator execution** - The translator is beginning SQL translation query execution

data.name: Log_DatabaseTranslator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with DatabaseTranslator** - Executing SQL query to translate the field value

data.name: Log_DatabaseTranslator_Success
data.value: **DatabaseTranslator execution completed successfully** - Database translation finished without errors

data.name: Log_DatabaseTranslator_Error
data.value: **Error in DatabaseTranslator execution** - A problem occurred during database translation

data.name: HpptNormalizer_Starting
data.value: Hppt Normalizer: Starting normalization.

data.name: HpptNormalizer_Processing
data.value: Hppt Normalizer: Processing value.

data.name: HpptNormalizer_Success
data.value: Hppt Normalizer: Normalization successful.

data.name: HpptNormalizer_Error
data.value: Hppt Normalizer: An error occurred during normalization.

data.name: HpptValidator_Starting
data.value: Hppt Validator: Starting validation.

data.name: HpptValidator_Processing
data.value: Hppt Validator: Processing value for validation.

data.name: HpptValidator_Success
data.value: Hppt Validator: Validation successful.

data.name: HpptValidator_Error
data.value: Hppt Validator: An error occurred during validation.

data.name: HpptTransformation_Starting
data.value: Hppt Transformation: Starting transformation.

data.name: HpptTransformation_Processing
data.value: Hppt Transformation: Processing value for transformation.

data.name: HpptTransformation_Success
data.value: Hppt Transformation: Transformation successful.

data.name: HpptTransformation_Error
data.value: Hppt Transformation: An error occurred during transformation.

data.name: Desc_HpptNormalizer_Url_Description
data.value: The URL of the external HTTP API for normalization.

data.name: Desc_HpptNormalizer_Headers_Description
data.value: Additional HTTP headers to include in the normalization request (JSON format).

data.name: Log_EmailValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting EmailValidator execution** - The validator is beginning email format verification

data.name: Log_EmailValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with EmailValidator** - Validating that the email has a correct format

data.name: Log_EmailValidator_Success
data.value: **EmailValidator execution completed successfully** - The email validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_EmailValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in EmailValidator execution** - A problem occurred during email validation

data.name: Desc_EmailValidator_Description
data.value: Validates that the provided value is an email address with a valid format. Accepts null/empty (use RequiredFieldValidator for required fields).

data.name: Desc_EmailValidator_Strict_Description
data.value: When true, applies strict validation based on normalization/regex; when false, uses basic heuristic checks.

data.name: Log_PhoneValidator_Starting
data.value: **Starting PhoneValidator execution** - The validator is beginning phone number verification

data.name: Log_PhoneValidator_Processing
data.value: **Processing field with PhoneValidator** - Validating that the phone number is possible and valid

data.name: Log_PhoneValidator_Success
data.value: **PhoneValidator execution completed successfully** - The phone number validation finished without errors

data.name: Log_PhoneValidator_Error
data.value: **Error in PhoneValidator execution** - A problem occurred during phone validation

data.name: Desc_PhoneValidator_Description
data.value: Validates that the provided value is a valid phone number. Accepts null/empty (use RequiredFieldValidator for required fields).

data.name: Desc_PhoneValidator_RegionIso_Description
data.value: ISO region code (e.g., ES, US) used for parsing when the number does not include an international prefix.

data.name: Desc_PhoneValidator_Strict_Description
data.value: When true, requires the number to be valid according to libphonenumber; when false, accepts basic sanitization.

data.name: Desc_Validator_AllowNull_Description
data.value: Indicates whether null values are allowed. If false (default), a null value will fail validation. If true, a null value will pass validation.
